title: Scattered Structures
description: Scattered Structures aims to make the world feel more like your own by making certain structures less common. This pack currently changes the rarity of six structures.
body:
![Scattered Structures Title](https://i.imgur.com/KBTUjhj.png)

Scattered Structures aims to make the world feel more like your own by making certain structures less common. This pack currently changes the rarity of six structures.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Structures**

- Ancient cities are as rare as mansions
- Ocean monuments are now as rare as mansions (They now have a reason to have an explorer map)
- Strongholds are limited to three and they spawn ~5,000 blocks away from spawn.
- Villages are as rare as mansions
- Shipwrecks are as rare as mansions- Ruined portals are as rare as mansions

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
